docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAWAIIAN AIRLIINES
